---
pagetitle: "Teaching and supervision | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Courses coordinated by Dr Mesfin Genie at the University of Newcastle, public teaching resources in behavioural economics, and research supervision."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell">
<p class="eyebrow">Teaching and supervision</p>
<h1>Teaching and supervision</h1>
<p>Courses I coordinate at the University of Newcastle, open teaching resources, and doctoral and MPhil supervision.</p>
</div></header>

<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow">

<h2>Courses</h2>
<div class="event-list">
<article class="publication-record"><div class="publication-title">ECON3111 Behavioural Economics</div><div class="publication-authors">Lecturer and Course Coordinator, The University of Newcastle</div><div class="publication-meta">Coordination: 24 February 2025 to 29 May 2026 · Teaching: 24 February 2025 to 25 June 2025</div><div class="publication-links"><a href="/teaching/behavioural-economics/">Teaching resources</a></div></article>
<article class="publication-record"><div class="publication-title">ECON2112 Health Economics and Finance</div><div class="publication-authors">Lecturer and Course Coordinator, The University of Newcastle</div><div class="publication-meta">Coordination: 24 February 2025 to 29 May 2026 · Teaching: 24 February 2025 to 25 June 2025</div></article>
<article class="publication-record"><div class="publication-title">ECON3011 Introduction to Health Economics and Finance</div><div class="publication-authors">Primary Course Coordinator, The University of Newcastle</div><div class="publication-meta">22 July 2024 to 29 November 2024</div></article>
</div>

<h2>Teaching resources</h2>
<p>Open resources drawn from my behavioural economics teaching. They favour explicit learning objectives, a clear benchmark-versus-behaviour logic, worked numerical examples, and exam-relevant synthesis.</p>
<p><a class="button-secondary" href="/teaching/behavioural-economics/">Behavioural economics resources</a></p>

<h2>Research supervision</h2>
<p>I supervise doctoral and MPhil candidates as principal and co-supervisor. The supervision page lists current and completed projects and explains what to include in a supervision enquiry.</p>
<p><a class="button-secondary" href="/supervision/">Research supervision</a></p>

</div></section>
<script type="application/ld+json">[
{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"Course","name":"ECON3111 Behavioural Economics","courseCode":"ECON3111","provider":{"@type":"CollegeOrUniversity","name":"The University of Newcastle"}},
{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"Course","name":"ECON2112 Health Economics and Finance","courseCode":"ECON2112","provider":{"@type":"CollegeOrUniversity","name":"The University of Newcastle"}},
{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"Course","name":"ECON3011 Introduction to Health Economics and Finance","courseCode":"ECON3011","provider":{"@type":"CollegeOrUniversity","name":"The University of Newcastle"}}
]</script>

```
